title: 输出要求整理
description: 触发：需要处理与输出要求整理相关的任务时 | 目标：A user may ask you to create, edit, or analyze the contents  | 步骤：Choose tool**: pandas for data, openpyxl for formulas/formatting；Create/Load**: Create new workbook or load existing file；Modify**: Add/edit data, formulas, and formatting | 产出：结构化结果
trigger: 需要处理与输出要求整理相关的任务时
goal: A user may ask you to create, edit, or analyze the contents
steps: Choose tool**: pandas for data, openpyxl for formulas/formatting
Create/Load**: Create new workbook or load existing file
Modify**: Add/edit data, formulas, and formatting
